# Jacob Vogan

> Bio × AI. Builds AI tools for biological research — agentic systems for bioinformatics, structural biology, biomanufacturing, and automated labs.

The aim is to speed the pace of research so people can live healthier, longer lives. Also other useful AI tools, like local text-to-speech, transcription, and running long-horizon agent work on cloud compute.

## About

- Name: Jacob Vogan
- Profile: https://github.com/jvogan
- Site: https://jvogan.github.io/
- Stack: Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Gemma, GPT-OSS

## Featured projects

### Orchestration — agent orchestration, Symphony, Linear, and cloud compute
- [symphony-linear-starter](https://github.com/jvogan/symphony-linear-starter) — Self-improving starter skill / operator toolkit for Codex or Claude Code as orchestrator over Symphony workers + Linear.
- [symphony-claude-lane](https://github.com/jvogan/symphony-claude-lane) — Portable skill for adding a Claude Code lane to OpenAI Symphony + Linear workflows.
- [symphony-neocloud-bridge](https://github.com/jvogan/symphony-neocloud-bridge) — Run agent workflows on cloud compute with preflight checks, cost caps, artifact receipts, and cleanup.
- [telegram-codex-bridge](https://github.com/jvogan/telegram-codex-bridge) — Local-first bridge: OpenAI Codex Desktop ↔ Telegram bot. Text, files, voice notes, and optional realtime calls.

### BioSymphony — agentic harnesses for biology and long-horizon agent orchestration
- [small-molecules](https://github.com/BioSymphony/small-molecules) — Small-molecule design workflows: choose tools, plan synthesis, dock ligands, and check ADMET.
- [structure-factory](https://github.com/BioSymphony/structure-factory) — AI-agent toolkit for structural biology: design binders, map structures, screen candidates, rank results, and prepare cloud-scale runs.
- [bioprospector](https://github.com/BioSymphony/bioprospector) — Biosynthetic route exploration for target molecules: find enzyme and gene candidates and turn pathway ideas into follow-up searches and experiments.
- [genecluster](https://github.com/BioSymphony/genecluster) — Genome-mining workflows for natural products: search public genomes and transcriptomes, compare candidate clusters, and plan follow-up work.
- [cryocore](https://github.com/BioSymphony/cryocore) — Cryo-EM workflows for maps, models, figures, state comparison, and local or cloud compute preparation.
- [ferm-doe](https://github.com/BioSymphony/ferm-doe) — Fermentation and biomanufacturing experiment planning: choose design families, check scale context, and prepare run packets.

### BioTools — bioinformatics, structural biology, lab tooling
- [biovoice](https://github.com/jvogan/biovoice) — Talk to your protein structures. Voice control for PyMOL, ChimeraX, AlphaFold, and Rosetta on the OpenAI Realtime API.
- [proteus](https://github.com/jvogan/proteus) — Structural biology superpowers for AI coding agents: PyMOL, ChimeraX, AlphaFold DB, RCSB PDB, UniProt, and Rosetta workflows.

### Agent Skills & Local AI — agent skills, local speech, dev infra
- [ai-chatbot-daneel](https://github.com/jvogan/ai-chatbot-daneel) — Skill that scaffolds a safe, multi-model chatbot for Telegram or Discord. Claude, GPT, Gemini, and OpenAI-compatible backends. Nine safety layers on by default.
- [Valar](https://github.com/jvogan/Valar) — Local speech stack for Apple Silicon: TTS, ASR, forced alignment, voices, daemon, and MCP bridge.
- [whisper-hud](https://github.com/jvogan/whisper-hud) — System-wide voice-to-text for macOS. Hold a hotkey, speak, text appears at your cursor. OpenAI / Gemini / Apple Speech / local — bring your own keys.
- [yt-agent](https://github.com/jvogan/yt-agent) — AI Agent Tool for terminal-first YouTube search, download, catalog, and clip tooling on yt-dlp.
